paragraphs: Still holding at 12 overdue — the backlog isn't shrinking. Well below the 7-day average of 21 — the team is making real progress. 23 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Kyle Aubry - Project 01, Clifford Clack — Gym Addition — cleared all overdue.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 6. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. $24,212 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,079 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Ginger Brown:** **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,165 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $21,212 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,772 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 upcoming tasks still unassigned.

260 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **88 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 3 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$78,920 in payments going out this week** across 31 tasks — make sure funds are available. $21,177 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 4. This needs to turn around today.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue — oldest first. 2 upcoming unassigned. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 44 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Clean — 3 tasks in progress. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff has 6 overdue across 2 projects with 1 tasks active.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 6 overdue — oldest first. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** **12 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 29 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is completely clean — no overdue tasks. Keep this up.

**Ginger Brown:** Clean — 3 tasks in progress. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. **21 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 38 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
